# tplinkeasysmart_vlan_8021q (Resource)

Manage one 802.1Q VLAN entry on the switch.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tplinkeasysmart_vlan_8021q" "users" {
  vlan_id        = 20
  name           = "Users"
  tagged_ports   = [1]
  untagged_ports = [2, 3]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) VLAN display name.
- `tagged_ports` (Set of Number) Ports that should be tagged members of the VLAN.
- `untagged_ports` (Set of Number) Ports that should be untagged members of the VLAN.
- `vlan_id` (Number) VLAN ID in the range 1-4094.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier derived from vlan_id.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = tplinkeasysmart_vlan_8021q.users
  id = "20"
}

resource "tplinkeasysmart_vlan_8021q" "users" {
  vlan_id        = 20
  name           = "Users"
  tagged_ports   = [1]
  untagged_ports = [2, 3]
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import tplinkeasysmart_vlan_8021q.users 20
```
